paper-400.$description: Warm taupe — borders in light mode (≥3:1 on paper surfaces)

sun-400.$description: Deeper gold — hover/active accent in dark mode

sky-600.$description: Medium blue — focus ring on light backgrounds (≥3:1 on paper surfaces)

danger-500.$description: Red — error states and destructive actions on light backgrounds

size-400.$description: Banner title — between body and heading
